questions.question: In supervised learning, what does the model receive during training?
questions.questionZh: 在监督学习（Supervised Learning）中，模型在训练期间会接收什么？
options: Only input data with no labels
Input-output pairs where the correct answer is provided
A reward signal for each action taken
A set of rules written by a human expert
optionsZh: 仅包含无标签的输入数据
提供正确答案的输入-输出对（Input-Output Pairs）
针对每个已执行动作的奖励信号 (Reward Signal)
由人类专家编写的一组规则
questions.explanation: Supervised learning trains on input-output pairs (labeled data). The model learns to map inputs to known correct outputs.
questions.explanationZh: 监督学习（Supervised Learning）基于输入-输出对（即标注数据（Labeled Data））进行训练。模型学习将输入映射到已知的正确输出。

questions.question: What is the purpose of splitting data into training and test sets?
questions.questionZh: 将数据划分为训练集（training set）和测试集（test set）的目的是什么？
options: To make training faster by using less data
To have backup data in case the training data is lost
To evaluate whether the model generalizes to data it has never seen during training
To balance the classes in the dataset
optionsZh: 通过减少数据量来加速训练
保留备份数据 (backup data)，以防训练数据 (training data) 丢失。
为了评估模型 (model) 是否能够泛化 (generalize) 到训练期间从未见过的数据
为平衡数据集 (dataset) 中的类别 (classes)
questions.explanation: The test set measures generalization. If you evaluate on training data, you measure memorization, not learning.
questions.explanationZh: 测试集（test set）用于衡量泛化能力（generalization）。若在训练数据（training data）上进行评估，所衡量的仅是记忆（memorization），而非学习（learning）。

questions.question: A model gets 98% accuracy on training data but 55% on test data. What is this an example of?
questions.questionZh: 某模型在训练数据（Training Data）上达到了 98% 的准确率（Accuracy），但在测试数据（Test Data）上仅为 55%。这属于什么现象？
options: Underfitting: the model is too simple
Overfitting: the model memorized training noise instead of learning general patterns
Data drift: the test distribution changed
Good generalization: the model learned the true patterns
optionsZh: 欠拟合（Underfitting）：模型过于简单
过拟合（Overfitting）：模型记住了训练噪声，而非学习通用模式。
数据漂移（Data drift）：测试集分布（test distribution）发生变化
良好的泛化 (Generalization) 能力：模型学习到了真实的规律。
questions.explanation: A large gap between training accuracy (high) and test accuracy (low) is the hallmark of overfitting. The model memorized the training data.
questions.explanationZh: 训练准确率（Training Accuracy）很高而测试准确率（Test Accuracy）很低，两者之间存在显著差距，这是过拟合（Overfitting）的典型标志。该模型只是死记硬背了训练数据。

questions.question: An e-commerce site wants to group customers into segments based on purchase behavior without any predefined labels. Which type of ML is this?
questions.questionZh: 某电商平台希望根据购买行为对客户进行细分，且不使用任何预定义标签。这属于哪种机器学习（Machine Learning）类型？
options: Supervised learning (classification)
Supervised learning (regression)
Unsupervised learning (clustering)
Reinforcement learning
optionsZh: 监督学习 (Supervised Learning)（分类 (Classification)）
监督学习 (Supervised Learning)（回归 (Regression)）
无监督学习（聚类）
强化学习 (Reinforcement Learning)
questions.explanation: Finding natural groupings in data without predefined labels is clustering, which is a form of unsupervised learning.
questions.explanationZh: 在没有预定义标签的数据中寻找自然分组的过程称为聚类（Clustering），它是无监督学习（Unsupervised Learning）的一种形式。

questions.question: Which scenario is NOT a good use case for machine learning?
questions.questionZh: 哪种场景不适合作为机器学习（Machine Learning）的用例？
options: Predicting customer churn from historical behavior data
Detecting fraudulent transactions in a stream of millions of payments
Converting temperatures from Celsius to Fahrenheit
Classifying images of skin lesions as benign or malignant
optionsZh: 基于历史行为数据（Historical Behavior Data）预测客户流失（Customer Churn）
在数百万笔支付的数据流中检测欺诈交易 (Fraudulent Transactions)
将温度从摄氏度 (Celsius) 转换为华氏度 (Fahrenheit)
将皮肤病变 (skin lesions) 图像分类为良性 (benign) 或恶性 (malignant)
questions.explanation: Celsius to Fahrenheit is a fixed formula (F = 9/5 * C + 32). Simple, well-defined rules do not need ML. ML adds complexity with no benefit.
questions.explanationZh: 摄氏度与华氏度的换算遵循固定公式（F = 9/5 * C + 32）。对于简单且定义明确的规则，无需使用机器学习（Machine Learning）。引入机器学习只会徒增复杂度，却毫无实际收益。
